calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-29-2002 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-28-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Cause assigned to Dept. 218 for settlement conference. Present: Commissioner L. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Eric L. Throne. Plaintiff represented by counsel,Saul Martin Ferster, ESQ. Defendant represented by Counsel, Claudia Lewin, Esq. Also present, Rev. J.C. Jenkins representing Church Of God In Christ. The parties enter into stipulation in settlement of the cause per the record. The Court orders the trial date vacated.
